category.scope_note: Battery energy storage system compliance comparison for Morocco export.

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Morocco IMANOR standards, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 adoption, ONEE grid-connection and storage requirements, fire safety, UN 38.3 transport, and 50 Hz system considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与摩洛哥IMANOR标准、IEC 62619及IEC 62933采标、ONEE储能并网要求、消防安全、UN 38.3运输及50 Hz系统要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與摩洛哥IMANOR標準、IEC 62619及IEC 62933採標、ONEE儲能併網要求、消防安全、UN 38.3運輸及50 Hz系統要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IMANOR scope determination, ONEE grid-connection or storage approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Morocco IMANOR, ONEE, Direction Générale de la Protection Civile, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IMANOR适用范围裁定、ONEE并网或储能批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行摩洛哥IMANOR、ONEE、民事保护总局及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IMANOR適用範圍裁定、ONEE併網或儲能批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行摩洛哥IMANOR、ONEE、民事保護總局及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Morocco, the main compliance gaps are: IMANOR NM standards adopting IEC 62619 for lithium battery safety and IEC 62933 for energy storage performance, ONEE grid-connection and ancillary-service requirements under loi 13-09, fire-safety review under Moroccan civil-protection rules, and UN 38.3 transport testing for battery cells. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 address similar technical areas but are not recognised by IMANOR or ONEE; an IEC-route dossier and Morocco project-specific grid settings are needed.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口摩洛哥时，主要合规差距包括：采标IEC 62619锂电池安全和IEC 62933储能性能的IMANOR NM标准、loi 13-09框架下的ONEE并网和辅助服务要求、摩洛哥民事保护规则下的消防安全审查，以及电池单体UN 38.3运输测试。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023在技术领域有一定对应，但不被IMANOR或ONEE认可；需要提供IEC路径文件包及摩洛哥项目特定并网设置。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口摩洛哥時，主要合規差距包括：採標IEC 62619鋰電池安全和IEC 62933儲能性能的IMANOR NM標準、loi 13-09框架下的ONEE併網和輔助服務要求、摩洛哥民事保護規則下的消防安全審查，以及電池單體UN 38.3運輸測試。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023在技術領域有一定對應，但不被IMANOR或ONEE認可；需要提供IEC路徑文件包及摩洛哥項目特定併網設定。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
